rationale.R1.1: The contribution claim is present but diffuse — the abstract leads with results before motivating the gap, and the core thesis (API-call-token insertion during decoding) competes for salience with evaluation numbers. Sharpening the framing is a plausible primary reading of 'stronger'.

rationale.R1.4: Prior-work contrast is thin — constrained decoding and post-editing are named but the delta (model-initiated call timing vs. inference-time term list) is buried in one sentence. Sharpening the novelty argument is a plausible primary reading of 'stronger'.
rationale.R1.6: Sentence-level prose has some weaknesses (passive stacking, abrupt paragraph transitions, result paragraph placed before problem statement). Writing polish is a plausible primary reading of 'stronger'.
